title: Resolution Reminding All Citizens of Los Baños to Continue Following Safety Measures and Coronavirus, Disease 2019 (COVID-19) Prevention As Prescribed Under General Community Quarantine (GCQ) Guidelines and Any Type of Community Quarantine the Municipality Shall Be Placed In. (AUTHOR(S): Councilor(s) Josephine Sumangil-evangelista, Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Arlene P. Delos Santos, and Jozylyn N. Manansala, 06/15/2020)
